description: Tool-less PR code reviewer, aggressive stance: reads a unified diff provided inline and writes a thorough, adversarial prose code review — no forced JSON shape, no grammar lock, no cap on findings, and no 'achieves its stated intent, therefore correct' auto-pass. Marks each real issue with a `MUST FIX:` (blocks merge) or `CONSIDER:` (non-blocking) line so the finding is still machine-locatable, but the model reasons and explains freely in its own words, and is explicitly instructed never to downgrade a self-noticed defect to unmarked commentary. Assumes a human author triages the output downstream, so recall is prioritized over precision. No repo, no shell, no tools — pure reasoning over the given diff.
